narrative:
Precinct Salem South (precinct in Champaign County) has 823 registered voters, with 50.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.4 percentage points.
